aiCommentCN: 跌的时候想抄底，抄完还继续跌
aiCommentEN: Falling prices make us want to buy, but it just keeps falling
aiSummaryCN:
【市场情绪】
当前比特币市场情绪较为谨慎，投资者观望为主。
【情绪信号】
社交媒体讨论热度降低、散户活跃度下降、衍生品多空比偏空。
【短期展望】
未来几天可能继续震荡，关注75,000美元支撑位。
【一句提醒】
投资者应保持耐心，等待市场明朗化后再做决策。
aiSummaryEN:
[Today's View]
The current bitcoin market sentiment is cautious, with investors waiting on the sidelines.
[Key Drivers]
Social media discussion heat decreased, retail investor activity declined, and derivatives long-short ratio is biased towards short.
[Outlook]
It may continue to fluctuate in the next few days, paying attention to the $75,000 support level.
[Reminder]
Investors should be patient and wait for the market to clarify before making decisions.
